title: VeloraOS 1.10.17 - Chat State Stability
releaseNotes: Fixes second and later Chat turns getting stuck after a completed background response.
Allows model selection to change during generation and applies the new selection to the next message without interrupting the current response.
Preserves the Chat viewport instead of forcing the conversation to the bottom on every state render.
Disables smooth auto-scroll and scroll anchoring that could cause top-to-bottom bouncing.
Preserves thinking dots, model intelligence, background jobs, HTTPS, PWA support and secure rollback updates.
